name: Trust / certification & partner logo bar
structure: horizontal strip of greyscale logos; often above footer or under hero
prevalence: certifications cited by ~70% (eidg. Diplom) / 68% (RAB); built sites only used text
patterns: Greyscale credential/partner logo strip directly below hero (borrowed credibility before the pitch)
CH trust currency: TREUHAND|SUISSE, EXPERTsuisse, Swiss GAAP FER, RAB; software badges bexio/Abacus
Regulatory/compliance badges also belong permanently in the footer
references: Vanta — SOC2/ISO badges as permanent furniture
Stripe/Notion — marquee logo wall under hero
